title: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities Catalog - Educational Sample

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Command Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A command injection vulnerability in PAN-OS GlobalProtect gateway and portal has been exploited in the wild.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Progress MOVEit Transfer SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A SQL injection vulnerability in MOVEit Transfer has been exploited for data theft campaigns.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply vendor updates and review affected systems.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Log4j Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A remote code execution vulnerability in Apache Log4j, commonly known as Log4Shell, has been widely exploited.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply updates according to vendor instructions.
